question: How do I install the posthog browser library?
goldAnswer: Run npm install posthog-js, then call posthog.init with your project API key.

question: How do I send a custom event?
goldAnswer: Use posthog.capture with an event name and an optional properties object.

question: How do I check whether a feature flag is enabled?
goldAnswer: Call posthog.isFeatureEnabled with the flag key.

question: How do I stop attributing events to a user after they log out?
How do I turn on session replay?
goldAnswer: Enable recording in project settings and set disable_session_recording to false.

question: How do I set up SAML single sign-on for my enterprise organization?
Can I get a refund on my annual billing plan?
